compiled_state.title: Tier B: Port ticket-revert.sh (REVERT event) to rebar._commands
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
revert (standalone script): REVERT event semantics, validation. test-ticket-revert*.sh as the gate.

Port behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES, switch-wired at dispatcher + library. Default stays bash.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] revert ported to rebar._commands, switch-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] Command's bash suite(s) green against REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=bash AND =python
- [ ] Error strings + exit codes byte-identical
- [ ] Default remains bash

comments.body: Ported in 7ab54921: revert_core/revert_cli (find-by-uuid, reject REVERT-of-REVERT, REVERT event via seam, ARCHIVED->marker-clear, confirmation line). Dual-run green bash AND python on test-ticket-id-resolution-direct-exec (41) + test-bridge-observability-e2e (23) + new revert_core parity tests. Default stays bash.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
